case_title: TSANG, SHEILA vs. NAVARO, ANELLA AKA BEA NAVARO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, SHEILA AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARO, ANELLA AKA BEA NAVARO
